The neighbor atoms of atom index 11 (C) are:
- **10 (C)** (covalently connected to the right)
- **12 (C)** (covalently connected below)
- **14 (H)** (covalently connected to the lower right)

The **geomconf_index** for this molecule is **6302**.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 11, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
